---
title: "PFLU Rewiring"
author: "Griffin Kramer"
date: "2026-02-10"
output: html_document
---

```{r}
library(readr)
library(dplyr)
library(stringr)
library(purrr)
library(tidyr)
library(tibble)
library(DESeq2)
library(rtracklayer)
library(ggplot2)
```

```{r}
#file loader function
read_featurecounts <- function(path) {
  fname <- basename(path)
  sampleID <- str_remove(fname, "\\.tsv$")
  x <- read_tsv(
    file = path,
    comment = "#",
    show_col_types = FALSE
  )
  count_col <- names(x)[ncol(x)]
  x %>%
    transmute(
      Geneid     = Geneid,
      Length     = as.numeric(Length),
      read_count = as.numeric(.data[[count_col]]),
      sampleID   = sampleID
    )
}
```

```{r}
#prepare annotation data
gff_path <- "annotation_data/genomic.gff"
gff <- import(gff_path)

map_tbl <- as.data.frame(gff) %>%
  filter(type == "gene") %>%
  transmute(
    rs = locus_tag,
    pflu_raw = old_locus_tag
  ) %>%
  filter(!is.na(rs), !is.na(pflu_raw)) %>%
  mutate(
    pflu = str_extract(pflu_raw, "PFLU_\\d+[A-Z]?")
  ) %>%
  filter(!is.na(pflu)) %>%
  distinct(rs, pflu)

motifs_path <- "annotation_data/ProPr54Output.tab"
motifs <- read.delim(motifs_path, check.names = FALSE)

sigma54_promoter_rs <- unique(motifs$`locus-tag`)

sigma54_promoter_genes <- map_tbl %>%
  filter(rs %in% sigma54_promoter_rs) %>%
  pull(pflu) %>%
  unique()

validated_path <- "annotation_data/journal.pbio.3002348.s014.csv" 
S7 <- read_csv(validated_path, show_col_types = FALSE)
sigma54_validated_genes <- unique(S7$`PseudoCAP ID`)

s54_path <- "annotation_data/PseudomonasFluorescensS54InteractionDomainContainingProteins.tsv" 
uniprot_path <- "annotation_data/uniprotkb_proteome_UP001152918_2026_01_26.tsv"                 

s54 <- read_tsv(s54_path, show_col_types = FALSE)
uniprot <- read_tsv(uniprot_path, show_col_types = FALSE)

uniprot_map <- uniprot %>%
  select(Entry, gene_names = `Gene Names`) %>%
  mutate(locus = str_extract(gene_names, "PFLU_\\d+[A-Z]?")) %>%
  filter(!is.na(locus)) %>%
  distinct(Entry, locus)

s54_pflu <- s54 %>%
  left_join(uniprot_map, by = c("Accession" = "Entry"))

sigma54_ebp_genes <- s54_pflu %>%
  pull(locus) %>%
  unique()

length(sigma54_promoter_genes)
length(sigma54_validated_genes)
length(sigma54_ebp_genes)

```


```{r}
### Main Method
## load files 
dir_path <- "data"

files <- list.files(
  dir_path,
  pattern = "\\.tsv$",
  full.names = TRUE
)

df_counts <- map_dfr(files, read_featurecounts)

df_counts <- df_counts %>%
  mutate(
    strain = str_extract(sampleID, "^[0-9]{4}"),
    strain = stringr::str_pad(strain, width = 4, side = "left", pad = "0"),
    strain = as.character(strain),
    evolved = if_else(str_detect(sampleID, "_E_"), "evolved", "ancestor"),
    rhamnose = if_else(str_detect(sampleID, "_R$"), "Rha", "NoRha")
  )

## compute lOGFC
df.nest <- df_counts %>%
  nest(.by = c(strain, rhamnose), .key = "data")

LOGFOLD <- df.nest %>% 
  mutate(matrix = map(data, ~ .x %>% 
                        select(Geneid, read_count, evolved) %>% 
                        pivot_wider(names_from = evolved, values_from = read_count) %>% 
                        column_to_rownames(var = "Geneid"))) %>% 
  mutate(colData = map(data, ~ .x %>% 
                         distinct(evolved) %>% 
                         mutate(evolved = factor(evolved, levels = c("ancestor","evolved"))) %>%
                         column_to_rownames(var = "evolved"))) %>% 
  mutate(dds = map2(.x = matrix, .y = colData,
                    ~ DESeqDataSetFromMatrix(countData = .x,
                                             colData = .y,
                                             design = ~ 1))) %>% 
  mutate(dds = map(dds, estimateSizeFactors)) %>% 
  mutate(norm_counts = map(dds, ~ counts(.x, normalized = TRUE))) %>% 
  mutate(log2FC = map(norm_counts, ~ log2(.x[, "evolved"] + 1) - log2(.x[, "ancestor"] + 1))) %>% 
  mutate(results = map2(norm_counts, log2FC,
                        ~ tibble(GeneID = rownames(.x),
                                 log2FC = as.numeric(.y),
                                 mean_norm_expr = rowMeans(.x)))) 


LOGFC_TABLE <- LOGFOLD %>%
  select(strain, rhamnose, results) %>%
  unnest(results)
```


```{r}
LOGFC_TABLE <- LOGFC_TABLE %>%
  mutate(
    is_sigma54_ebp       = GeneID %in% sigma54_ebp_genes,
    is_sigma54_predicted = GeneID %in% sigma54_promoter_genes,
    is_sigma54_validated = GeneID %in% sigma54_validated_genes
  ) 

LOGFC_TABLE %>%
  summarise(
    ebp = sum(is_sigma54_ebp),
    predicted = sum(is_sigma54_predicted),
    validated = sum(is_sigma54_validated),
  )
```

# Do we see a general pattern of upregulation across σ54-EBP controlled genes after a rewiring event?

```{r}

density_plot <- ggplot(
  LOGFC_TABLE,
  aes(x = log2FC,
      fill = is_sigma54_predicted,
      color = is_sigma54_predicted)
) +
  geom_density(alpha = 0.35, linewidth = 0.8) +
  facet_grid(rhamnose ~ strain) +
  scale_fill_manual(
    values = c("grey70", "red"),
    labels = c("Other genes", "σ54 predicted targets"),
    name = NULL
  ) +
  scale_color_manual(
    values = c("grey50", "red"),
    labels = c("Other genes", "σ54 predicted targets"),
    name = NULL
  ) +
  theme_classic(base_size = 13) +
  labs(
    x = "log2 Fold Change (Evolved − Ancestor)",
    y = "Density",
    title = "Distribution of Expression Shifts Across σ54 Targets"
  )

violin_plot <- ggplot(
  LOGFC_TABLE,
  aes(x = is_sigma54_predicted,
      y = log2FC,
      fill = is_sigma54_predicted)
) +
  geom_violin(trim = FALSE, alpha = 0.5) +
  geom_boxplot(width = 0.12, outlier.size = 0.3, alpha = 0.8) +
  facet_grid(rhamnose ~ strain) +
  scale_fill_manual(
    values = c("grey70", "red"),
    labels = c("Other genes", "σ54 predicted targets"),
    name = NULL
  ) +
  theme_classic(base_size = 13) +
  labs(
    x = "",
    y = "log2 Fold Change",
    title = "σ54 Targets Show Systematic Expression Shifts After Rewiring"
  ) +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(size = 11),
    strip.text = element_text(size = 12)
  )

LOGFC_TABLE <- LOGFC_TABLE %>%
  mutate(
    s54_category = case_when(
      is_sigma54_ebp ~ "σ54 EBP",
      is_sigma54_predicted & is_sigma54_validated ~ "Predicted + Validated",
      is_sigma54_predicted & !is_sigma54_validated ~ "Predicted only",
      !is_sigma54_predicted & is_sigma54_validated ~ "Validated only",
      TRUE ~ "Other genes"
    )
  )


ma_plot <- ggplot(
  LOGFC_TABLE,
  aes(x = log10(mean_norm_expr + 1),
      y = log2FC,
      color = s54_category)
) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.5, size = 0.7) +
  facet_grid(rhamnose ~ strain) +
  scale_color_manual(
    values = c(
      "Other genes" = "grey80",
      "σ54 EBP" = "green",
      "Predicted + Validated" = "purple",
      "Predicted only" = "red",
      "Validated only" = "blue"
    )
  ) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed") +
  theme_classic(base_size = 13) +
  labs(
    x = "log10(mean normalized expression + 1)",
    y = "log2 Fold Change (Evolved − Ancestor)",
    color = NULL,
    title = "MA Plot Highlighting σ54 Regulatory Classes"
  )


ggsave("results/s54_MA.png", ma_plot, width = 10, height = 6, dpi = 300)


ggsave(
  "results/density_plot.pdf",
  density_plot,
  width = 12,
  height = 10
)
ggsave(
  "results/violin_plot.pdf",
  violin_plot,
  width = 12,
  height = 10
)

wilcox_table <- LOGFC_TABLE %>%
  mutate(
    is_sigma54_predval =
      is_sigma54_predicted | is_sigma54_validated
  )

wilcox_results <- wilcox_table %>%
  group_by(strain, rhamnose) %>%
  summarise(
    p_value = wilcox.test(log2FC ~ is_sigma54_predval)$p.value,
    median_sigma = median(log2FC[is_sigma54_predval], na.rm = TRUE),
    median_other = median(log2FC[!is_sigma54_predval], na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

wilcox_results <- wilcox_results %>%
  mutate(
    delta = median_sigma - median_other,
    .after = p_value
  )

write_csv(
  wilcox_results,
  "results/wilcox_results.csv"
)
wilcox_results

```


```{r ma_plots_individual, fig.width=7, fig.height=5, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
# install.packages("ggrepel")
library(ggrepel)

dir.create("results/ma_individual_labeled", showWarnings = FALSE, recursive = TRUE)

make_ma_single_top_labels <- function(df_panel, n_each = 5) {

  df_panel <- df_panel %>%
    mutate(
      x_plot = log10(mean_norm_expr + 1),
      y_plot = log2FC,
      abs_y  = abs(y_plot)
    )

  top_ebp <- df_panel %>%
    filter(s54_category == "σ54 EBP") %>%
    arrange(desc(abs_y)) %>%
    slice_head(n = n_each)

  target_classes <- c("Predicted + Validated", "Predicted only", "Validated only")

  top_targets <- df_panel %>%
    filter(s54_category %in% target_classes) %>%
    arrange(desc(abs_y)) %>%
    slice_head(n = n_each)

  labels_df <- bind_rows(top_ebp, top_targets) %>%
    distinct(GeneID, .keep_all = TRUE)

  p <- ggplot(df_panel, aes(x = x_plot, y = y_plot, color = s54_category)) +
    geom_point(alpha = 0.55, size = 0.8) +
    geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed") +
    scale_color_manual(values = c(
      "Other genes" = "grey80",
      "σ54 EBP" = "darkgreen",
      "Predicted + Validated" = "purple",
      "Predicted only" = "red",
      "Validated only" = "blue"
    )) +
    ggrepel::geom_text_repel(
      data = labels_df,
      aes(label = GeneID),
      size = 3,
      max.overlaps = Inf,
      box.padding = 0.35,
      min.segment.length = 0
    ) +
    theme_classic(base_size = 13) +
    labs(
      x = "log10(mean normalized expression + 1)",
      y = "log2 Fold Change (Evolved − Ancestor)",
      color = NULL,
      title = paste0("MA Plot: ", df_panel$strain[1], " — ", df_panel$rhamnose[1]),
      subtitle = paste0("Labels: top ", n_each, " EBPs + top ", n_each, " σ54 targets (by |log2FC|)")
    )

  p
}

panel_list <- LOGFC_TABLE %>%
  mutate(
    strain   = factor(strain, levels = c("0286","2209","2630","4895")),
    rhamnose = factor(rhamnose, levels = c("NoRha","Rha"))
  ) %>%
  group_by(strain, rhamnose) %>%
  group_split(.keep = TRUE)

panel_names <- purrr::map_chr(panel_list, ~ paste0(.x$strain[1], "_", .x$rhamnose[1]))
names(panel_list) <- panel_names

purrr::walk2(panel_list, names(panel_list), function(df_panel, nm) {
  p <- make_ma_single_top_labels(df_panel, n_each = 5)
  print(p)
  ggsave(
    filename = file.path("results/ma_individual_labeled", paste0("MA_", nm, "_toplabels.png")),
    plot = p,
    width = 7,
    height = 5,
    dpi = 300
  )
})


```




```{r}
write.csv(
  LOGFC_TABLE,
  file = "results/LOGFC_TABLE.csv",
  row.names = FALSE
)

```



```{r}


LOGFC_TABLE_filtered <- LOGFC_TABLE %>%
  filter(is_sigma54_ebp == TRUE | is_sigma54_ebp == "True")

LOGFC_TABLE_filtered <- LOGFC_TABLE_filtered %>%
  mutate(strainRha = paste0(strain, rhamnose))


LOGFC_TABLE_wide <- LOGFC_TABLE_filtered %>%
  select(GeneID, strainRha, log2FC) %>%
  pivot_wider(
    names_from = strainRha,
    values_from = log2FC
  ) %>%
  arrange(GeneID)

write.csv(
  LOGFC_TABLE_wide,
  file = "results/EBP_TABLE.csv",
  row.names = FALSE
)

library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(stringr)
library(ggplot2)

delta_df <- LOGFC_TABLE_wide %>%
  pivot_longer(-GeneID, names_to = "strainRha", values_to = "log2FC") %>%
  mutate(
    strain = str_extract(strainRha, "^[0-9]+"),
    rha = str_replace(strainRha, "^[0-9]+", "")
  ) %>%
  select(GeneID, strain, rha, log2FC) %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = rha, values_from = log2FC) %>%
  mutate(delta = Rha - NoRha)

ggplot(delta_df, aes(x = strain, y = delta)) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = 2) +
  geom_boxplot(outlier.shape = NA) +
  geom_jitter(width = 0.15, alpha = 0.6) +
  theme_bw() +
  labs(title = "Rhamnose effect on σ54 EBPs (Δlog2FC = Rha − NoRha)",
       y = "Δlog2FC", x = "Strain")

```

```{r}
library(pheatmap)

mat <- LOGFC_TABLE_wide %>%
  column_to_rownames("GeneID") %>%
  as.matrix()

mat_z <- t(scale(t(mat)))

pheatmap(
  mat_z,
  cluster_rows = FALSE,
  cluster_cols = FALSE,
  na_col = "grey90",
  main = "σ54 EBP log2FC (row-scaled)"
)
```
```{r}
delta_mat <- delta_df %>%
  select(GeneID, strain, delta) %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = strain, values_from = delta) %>%
  column_to_rownames("GeneID") %>%
  as.matrix()

pheatmap(
  delta_mat,
  cluster_rows = TRUE,
  cluster_cols = TRUE,
  main = "Δlog2FC (Rha − NoRha) for σ54 EBPs"
)
```

```{r}
LOGFC_TABLE_filtered %>%
  filter(GeneID == "PFLU_5143") %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = rhamnose, y = log2FC, group = strain, color = strain)) +
  geom_point(size = 3) +
  geom_line() +
  theme_bw()

```
